assertions.text: All four key questions answered: commercial use, modification, attribution, share-alike
A model attribution line is provided
If a specific use case is described, a clear yes/no verdict is given

four-questions.note: All four questions answered: commercial yes, modification yes, attribution required, share-alike required

model-attribution.note: Model attribution line provided for magazine print context

use-case-verdict.note: Clear yes verdict with note about share-alike obligation for redrawn diagram

four-questions.note: All four answered for CC0: no restrictions on any of the four

model-attribution.note: Attribution line noted as not required but good practice

use-case-verdict.note: Clear yes verdict for commercial use without attribution

four-questions.note: All four answered: commercial restricted (NC), modification allowed, attribution required, no share-alike

model-attribution.note: Model attribution line provided for broadcast documentary context

use-case-verdict.note: Clear no verdict: ZDF broadcast is commercial use, NC licence restricts this
